name: SoloFounderFramework
description: Unified Antigravity 2.0 framework containing Memory (Brain), Strategy (Product), and Execution (Engineering)

slashCommands.name: analyze-cohorts
slashCommands.description: Perform cohort analysis on user data — retention curves, feature adoption, and engagement trends
slashCommands.argumentHint: <data file or description of what to analyze>

slashCommands.name: analyze-feedback
slashCommands.description: Analyze user feedback at scale — sentiment analysis, theme extraction, and segment-level insights
slashCommands.argumentHint: <feedback data as CSV, text, or file>

slashCommands.name: analyze-test
slashCommands.description: Analyze A/B test results — statistical significance, sample size validation, and ship/extend/stop recommendations
slashCommands.argumentHint: <test results as data, screenshot, or description>

slashCommands.name: battlecard
slashCommands.description: Create a sales-ready competitive battlecard — positioning, feature comparison, objection handling, and win strategies

slashCommands.name: brainstorm
slashCommands.description: Brainstorm product ideas or experiments from PM, Designer, and Engineer perspectives — for existing or new products

slashCommands.name: business-model
slashCommands.description: Explore business models using Lean Canvas, Business Model Canvas, Startup Canvas, or Value Proposition frameworks

slashCommands.name: competitive-analysis
slashCommands.description: Analyze the competitive landscape — identify competitors, compare strengths and weaknesses, find differentiation opportunities

slashCommands.name: derive-tests
slashCommands.description: Turn documented intent into a test-coverage map — inventory the tests that exist today, derive use-case cases from the system docs, separate existing coverage from proposed tests and unverified gaps, mark each unit / guarded-live / manual, and recommend a green-before-merge CI gate
slashCommands.argumentHint: <repo path or area; defaults to the whole repository>

slashCommands.name: discover
slashCommands.description: Run a full product discovery cycle — from ideation through assumption mapping to experiment design

slashCommands.name: document-app
slashCommands.description: Reverse-engineer an AI-built codebase into the system documents reviewers and auditors need — a core set (architecture, flows, permissions, variables) plus conditional docs (emails, cron, SEO, automation) when they apply
slashCommands.argumentHint: <repo path or area; defaults to the whole repository>

slashCommands.name: draft-nda
slashCommands.description: Draft a Non-Disclosure Agreement between two parties with jurisdiction-appropriate clauses

slashCommands.name: generate-data
slashCommands.description: Generate realistic dummy datasets for testing — CSV, JSON, SQL inserts, or Python scripts

slashCommands.name: growth-strategy
slashCommands.description: Design sustainable growth mechanisms — growth loops and GTM motions for product-led and sales-led strategies

slashCommands.name: interview
slashCommands.description: Prepare a customer interview script or summarize an interview transcript into structured insights

slashCommands.name: market-product
slashCommands.description: Brainstorm marketing ideas, positioning, value prop statements, and product names — creative marketing toolkit

slashCommands.name: market-scan
slashCommands.description: Comprehensive macro environment analysis — SWOT, PESTLE, Porter's Five Forces, and Ansoff Matrix in one scan

slashCommands.name: meeting-notes
slashCommands.description: Summarize a meeting transcript into structured notes with decisions, action items, and follow-ups

slashCommands.name: north-star
slashCommands.description: Define your North Star Metric and supporting input metrics — classify the business game and validate against best practices

slashCommands.name: performance-audit-static
slashCommands.description: Static performance audit of AI-built code — find over-fetching, missing indexes, and caching opportunities, ranked by effort and impact
slashCommands.argumentHint: <repo path or area; defaults to the whole repository>

slashCommands.name: plan-launch
slashCommands.description: Create a full go-to-market strategy — beachhead segment, ICP, messaging, channels, and launch plan

slashCommands.name: plan-okrs
slashCommands.description: Brainstorm team-level OKRs aligned with company objectives — qualitative objectives with measurable key results

slashCommands.name: pre-mortem
slashCommands.description: Run a pre-mortem risk analysis on a PRD, launch plan, or feature — identify what could go wrong before it does

slashCommands.name: pricing
slashCommands.description: Design a pricing strategy — models, competitive analysis, willingness-to-pay estimation, and pricing experiments

slashCommands.name: privacy-policy
slashCommands.description: Draft a privacy policy covering data collection, usage, storage, and compliance requirements

slashCommands.name: proofread
slashCommands.description: Check grammar, logic, and flow in any text — targeted fixes without rewriting

slashCommands.name: red-team-prd
slashCommands.description: Red-team a PRD, roadmap, or strategy — attack its load-bearing assumptions and return the cheapest test for each before you commit
slashCommands.argumentHint: <PRD, roadmap, strategy, or the current doc>

slashCommands.name: research-users
slashCommands.description: Comprehensive user research — build personas, segment users, and map the customer journey from research data
slashCommands.argumentHint: <research data, survey results, or product description>

slashCommands.name: review-resume
slashCommands.description: Comprehensive PM resume review against 10 best practices — structure, impact metrics, keywords, and actionable feedback

slashCommands.name: security-audit-static
slashCommands.description: Static security audit of AI-built code — map trust boundaries, cross-reference documented intent, self-refute every finding, and report only evidence-backed risks
slashCommands.argumentHint: <repo path or area; defaults to the whole repository>

slashCommands.name: setup-metrics
slashCommands.description: Design a product metrics dashboard with North Star metric, input metrics, health metrics, and alert thresholds

slashCommands.name: ship-check
slashCommands.description: Turn a vibe-coded repo into a reviewer-ready shipping packet — document the app, wire agent context, run security and performance audits, map test coverage, and compile the results
slashCommands.argumentHint: <repo path or area; defaults to the whole repository>

slashCommands.name: sprint
slashCommands.description: Sprint lifecycle — plan a sprint, run a retrospective, or generate release notes

slashCommands.name: stakeholder-map
slashCommands.description: Map stakeholders on a Power × Interest grid and create a tailored communication plan

slashCommands.name: strategy
slashCommands.description: Create a comprehensive product strategy using the 9-section Strategy Canvas — from vision to defensibility

slashCommands.name: tailor-resume
slashCommands.description: Tailor a PM resume to a specific job description — keyword alignment, experience reframing, and strategic optimization

slashCommands.name: test-scenarios
slashCommands.description: Generate comprehensive test scenarios from user stories or feature specs — happy paths, edge cases, and error handling

slashCommands.name: transform-roadmap
slashCommands.description: Convert a feature-based roadmap into an outcome-focused roadmap that communicates strategic intent
slashCommands.argumentHint: <roadmap as text, file, or list of planned features>

slashCommands.name: triage-requests
slashCommands.description: Analyze, categorize, and prioritize a batch of feature requests from customers or stakeholders
slashCommands.argumentHint: <feature requests as text, file, or paste>

slashCommands.name: value-proposition
slashCommands.description: Design a value proposition using the 6-part JTBD template — Who, Why, What before, How, What after, Alternatives

slashCommands.name: write-prd
slashCommands.description: Create a comprehensive Product Requirements Document from a feature idea or problem statement

slashCommands.name: write-query
slashCommands.description: Generate SQL queries from natural language — supports BigQuery, PostgreSQL, MySQL, and more
slashCommands.argumentHint: <what you want to know, in plain English>

slashCommands.name: write-stories
slashCommands.description: Break a feature into backlog items — user stories, job stories, or WWA format with acceptance criteria
